Model before rewriting:

find a: int(1..75)
find b: int(1..75)
find c: int(1..5)

such that

((c ** 2) = sum([(a ** 2),(b ** 2);int(1..2)]))

--

Final model:

find a: int(1..75)
find b: int(1..75)
find c: int(1..5)
find __0: int(1, 4, 9, 16, 25)
find __1: int(2..11250)
find __2: int(1, 4, 9, 16, 25, 36, 49, 64, 81, 100, 121, 144, 169, 196, 225, 256, 289, 324, 361, 400, 441, 484, 529, 576, 625, 676, 729, 784, 841, 900, 961, 1024, 1089, 1156, 1225, 1296, 1369, 1444, 1521, 1600, 1681, 1764, 1849, 1936, 2025, 2116, 2209, 2304, 2401, 2500, 2601, 2704, 2809, 2916, 3025, 3136, 3249, 3364, 3481, 3600, 3721, 3844, 3969, 4096, 4225, 4356, 4489, 4624, 4761, 4900, 5041, 5184, 5329, 5476, 5625)
find __3: int(1, 4, 9, 16, 25, 36, 49, 64, 81, 100, 121, 144, 169, 196, 225, 256, 289, 324, 361, 400, 441, 484, 529, 576, 625, 676, 729, 784, 841, 900, 961, 1024, 1089, 1156, 1225, 1296, 1369, 1444, 1521, 1600, 1681, 1764, 1849, 1936, 2025, 2116, 2209, 2304, 2401, 2500, 2601, 2704, 2809, 2916, 3025, 3136, 3249, 3364, 3481, 3600, 3721, 3844, 3969, 4096, 4225, 4356, 4489, 4624, 4761, 4900, 5041, 5184, 5329, 5476, 5625)

such that

(__0 = __1),
MinionPow(c,2,__0),
SumLeq([__2, __3], __1),
SumGeq([__2, __3], __1),
MinionPow(a,2,__2),
MinionPow(b,2,__3)
